name: Olive Garden Eggplant Parmigiana
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice Mozzarella cheese.
2. Moisten eggplant and coat lightly with flour.
3. Quickly brown slices in hot oil, dusting each side generously with seasoned salt. When fork-tender and golden brown, transfer to a jelly roll pan. Cover loosely with foil and bake at 375°F for about 20-25 minutes, or until tender.
4. Use 8 slices of eggplant for this amount of sauce.
5. Combine the sauce, jelly, and tomatoes that have been broken up with a fork. Heat on medium until piping hot, ensuring the jelly is melted.
6. Arrange 2 slices of eggplant on each of 4 plates. Cover each with 1 slice of Mozzarella cheese.
7. Ladle sauce over all, not to cover completely. Place plates in the oven at 375°F for just a moment to melt the cheese and serve promptly.
